response: <<EMILY IS A 14-YEAR-OLD ASPIRING OPERA SINGER WHO PRACTICES SINGING EVERY DAY TO PERFECT HER CRAFT. SHE DEDICATES 2 HOURS EACH WEDNESDAY AND 3 HOURS EACH WEEKEND DAY TO HER SINGING PRACTICE. HOW MANY TOTAL HOURS DOES EMILY SPEND PRACTICING HER SINGING IN A WEEK? START AND END YOUR RESPONSE WITH THE SAME WORD DO NOT WRITE ANYTHING AFTER THE LAST WORD NOT EVEN PUNCTUATION. WRAP EVERY WORD BIGRAM IN DOUBLE ANGULAR BRACKETS SUCH AS I AM AT HOME WITH MY WITH MY CUTE DOG. DO NOT INCLUDE KEYWORD WEEK? IN THE RESPONSE. WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS SHOULD APPEAR AT LEAST 38 TIMES>>
